title: MTR: Airplane Related Crafting Recipes
description: The MTR mod doesn't have any crafts for airplane related items, this datapack fixes it !
body:
## This datapack features 3 new carfting recipes that the mod MTR didn't add witch are :

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e13218d697b535cf1ad5088d7b3a7dfdee8e9145.png)
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3ccc658d9f672741c6415d0eaa49dedd7b4ac45.png)
![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/028c9ed189b306bd6fd548c0f29fe9e3618c27bf.png)

**PS :** _Any type of planks can be used for the airplane node crafting recipe_

### Requirements :
- Minecraft Transit Railway mod (MTR)
